import struct

buildid = bytes.fromhex('4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801')

# Minimal ELF64 with a GNU .note.gnu.build-id section
# ELF Header
EI_MAG = b'\x7fELF'
EI_CLASS = 2  # 64-bit
EI_DATA = 1   # little-endian
EI_VERSION = 1
EI_OSABI = 0
e_type = 3    # ET_DYN (shared lib)
e_machine = 183  # EM_AARCH64
e_version = 1
e_entry = 0
e_flags = 0

# Build the note segment data
# Nhdr: namesz, descsz, type
namesz = 4  # 'GNU\0'
descsz = len(buildid)  # 20 bytes
note_type = 3  # NT_GNU_BUILD_ID
note_name = b'GNU\x00'
note_desc = buildid
# Pad name and desc to 4-byte alignment
note_name_padded = note_name + b'\x00' * ((4 - len(note_name) % 4) % 4)
note_desc_padded = note_desc + b'\x00' * ((4 - len(note_desc) % 4) % 4)
note_data = struct.pack('<III', namesz, descsz, note_type) + note_name_padded + note_desc_padded

# Layout:
# 0x00: ELF header (64 bytes)
# 0x40: Program header table (1 entry = 56 bytes) 
# 0x78: Section header table (3 entries = 3*64 bytes)
# 0x138: Note data
# 0x138+len(note_data): Section name string table

ehdr_size = 64
phdr_size = 56
shdr_size = 64
phdr_off = ehdr_size  # 0x40
shdr_off = phdr_off + phdr_size  # 0x78
note_off = shdr_off + 3 * shdr_size  # 0x138
shstrtab_off = note_off + len(note_data)

# Section name strings
shstrtab = b'\x00.note.gnu.build-id\x00.shstrtab\x00'

total_size = shstrtab_off + len(shstrtab)

# ELF Header
ehdr = struct.pack('<4sBBBBB7xHHIQQQIHHHHHH',
    EI_MAG, EI_CLASS, EI_DATA, EI_VERSION, EI_OSABI, 0,
    e_type, e_machine, e_version,
    e_entry,      # e_entry
